arguments.command:
cd /tmp/sv-9f309fc7a14246a380b77fa51d963d8d && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

# The .ips file has a JSON header on line 1, then the main JSON body from line 2 onward
with open("ios_crash.ips") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

header = json.loads(lines[0])
body = json.loads("".join(lines[1:]))

images = body["usedImages"]

# Collect all unsymbolicated frames from lastExceptionBacktrace and crash thread
print("=" * 80)
print("CRASH SUMMARY")
print("=" * 80)
print(f"App:       {header['app_name']} v{header['app_version']} (build {header['build_version']})")
print(f"Bundle:    {header['bundleID']}")
print(f"Exception: {body['exception']['type']} / {body['termination']['indicator']}")
print(f"Device:    {body['modelCode']} / {header['os_version']}")
print()

# Show app-related images (source "P" from app bundle)
print("=" * 80)
print("APP / .NET BINARY IMAGES")
print("=" * 80)
app_images = {}
for i, img in enumerate(images):
    path = img.get("path", "")
    if "SampleMAUI.app" in path or "coreclr" in path:
        base_hex = f"0x{img['base']:X}"
        end_hex = f"0x{img['base'] + img['size']:X}"
        uuid = img.get("uuid", "N/A")
        name = img.get("name", "N/A")
        print(f"  [{i:2d}] {name}")
        print(f"       Base: {base_hex}  End: {end_hex}  UUID: {uuid}")
        print(f"       Path: {path}")
        print()
        app_images[i] = img

# Find unsymbolicated frames
print("=" * 80)
print("UNSYMBOLICATED .NET FRAMES (lastExceptionBacktrace)")
print("=" * 80)

unresolved = []
for idx, frame in enumerate(body["lastExceptionBacktrace"]):
    if "symbol" not in frame:
        img_idx = frame["imageIndex"]
        img = images[img_idx]
        offset = frame["imageOffset"]
        addr = img["base"] + offset
        name = img.get("name", "???")
        uuid = img.get("uuid", "???")
        unresolved.append({
            "frame_idx": idx,
            "img_idx": img_idx,
            "img_name": name,
            "img_base": img["base"],
            "offset": offset,
            "addr": addr,
            "uuid": uuid,
            "path": img.get("path", "")
        })
        print(f"  Frame {idx:2d}: imageIndex={img_idx} ({name})")
        print(f"           offset=0x{offset:X}  addr=0x{addr:X}")

# Also check crash thread
print()
print("=" * 80)
print("UNSYMBOLICATED .NET FRAMES (crash thread 0)")
print("=" * 80)
crash_thread = body["threads"][body["faultingThread"]]
has_unresolved_thread = False
for idx, frame in enumerate(crash_thread["frames"]):
    if "symbol" not in frame:
        img_idx = frame["imageIndex"]
        img = images[img_idx]
        offset = frame["imageOffset"]
        addr = img["base"] + offset
        name = img.get("name", "???")
        has_unresolved_thread = True
        print(f"  Frame {idx:2d}: imageIndex={img_idx} ({name})")
        print(f"           offset=0x{offset:X}  addr=0x{addr:X}")
if not has_unresolved_thread:
    print("  (all frames already symbolicated)")

# Group by image and generate atos commands
print()
print("=" * 80)
print("dSYM LOOKUP INFO")
print("=" * 80)
from collections import defaultdict
by_image = defaultdict(list)
for u in unresolved:
    by_image[u["img_idx"]].append(u)

for img_idx, frames in sorted(by_image.items()):
    img = images[img_idx]
    name = img.get("name", "???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid", "???")
    path = img.get("path", "")
    base_hex = f"0x{img['base']:X}"
    print(f"\n  Image: {name} (index {img_idx})")
    print(f"  UUID:  {uuid}")
    print(f"  Path:  {path}")
    print(f"  Base:  {base_hex}")
    
    if "SampleMAUI.framework/SampleMAUI" in path:
        print(f"  dSYM:  Look in your build output for:")
        print(f"         bin/Release/net9.0-ios/ios-arm64/SampleMAUI.app.dSYM/")
        print(f"         or: ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/.../SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM/")
        print(f"         Match UUID: {uuid}")
    elif "libcoreclr" in path:
        print(f"  dSYM:  Ships with .NET SDK. Look in:")
        print(f"         <dotnet-sdk>/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Runtime.ios-arm64/<version>/runtimes/ios-arm64/native/")
        print(f"         or NuGet cache: ~/.nuget/packages/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.ios-arm64/")
        print(f"         Match UUID: {uuid}")

    addrs = " ".join(f"0x{f['addr']:X}" for f in frames)
    print(f"\n  atos command:")
    print(f"  atos -arch arm64 -o <path-to-{name}.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{name}> -l {base_hex} {addrs}")

# Also check all threads for unsymbolicated frames from .NET images
print()
print("=" * 80)
print("FULL atos COMMANDS (copy-paste ready)")
print("=" * 80)
for img_idx, frames in sorted(by_image.items()):
    img = images[img_idx]
    name = img.get("name", "???")
    uuid = img.get("uuid", "???")
    base_hex = f"0x{img['base']:X}"
    addrs = " ".join(f"0x{f['addr']:X}" for f in frames)
    
    if "SampleMAUI.framework" in img.get("path", ""):
        dsym_hint = "SampleMAUI.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/SampleMAUI"
    elif "libcoreclr" in name:
        dsym_hint = "libcoreclr.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/libcoreclr"
    else:
        dsym_hint = f"{name}.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{name}"
    
    print(f"\n# {name} (UUID: {uuid})")
    print(f"atos -arch arm64 -o {dsym_hint} -l {base_hex} {addrs}")

PYEOF

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a good picture of the crash log. Let me summarize the key findings:

**Crash summary:**
- App: SampleMAUI (com.companyname.samplemaui) v1.0
- Exception: EXC_CRASH / SIGABRT (abort() called)
- The crash happens during app launch in `application:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:`

**Key images (from usedImages):**

| Index | Name | Base (decimal) | Base (hex) | UUID | Type |
|-------|------|---------------|------------|------|------|
| 0 | SampleMAUI (main binary) | 4306796544 | 0x100B24000 | 0c8adddd-a192-38f1-bc99-69e89ee24577 | App |


| 1 | SampleMAUI.framework | 4310646784 | 0x100EE8000 | f6b3b8c8-6799-3123-953a-d09d7ae501a4 | AOT compiled .NET code |
| 7 | libcoreclr | 4332584960 | 0x102400000 | 87d24fda-191f-3938-8063-4c56f505eb9d | .NET runtime |
